news:news.news:title: Hamas rejects disarmament talks, while global tensions rise with US-Iran relations and violence in Turkey and Lebanon.
news:news.news:keywords: Middle East conflict updates, US-China relations, political controversies in Hungary, shooting incidents in Turkey, Cameroon separatist movements

news:news.news:title: The IMF warns that escalating tensions in Iran could lead to a global recession, impacting the UK more severely than other G7 nations.
news:news.news:keywords: global recession risks, airline merger implications, BP corporate restructuring, Goldman Sachs AI concerns, local news sustainability

news:news.news:title: Microsoft is discontinuing its Surface Hub touchscreen displays, while privacy advocates are urging Google to halt data sharing with ICE amid rising concerns over consumer privacy.
news:news.news:keywords: Microsoft Surface Hub discontinuation, Netgear router FCC approval, Google data privacy concerns, Elon Musk X Money platform, Amazon streaming bundle offer

news:news.news:title: The NBA playoffs are underway with significant matchups, while various sports face controversies and injuries affecting teams and players.
news:news.news:keywords: NBA playoffs updates, coaching controversies in sports, impact of player injuries on teams

news:news.news:title: Recent scientific discoveries include a rare cosmic reaction, debunking myths about Hawaiian birds, and insights into weight gain linked to carbohydrate consumption.
news:news.news:keywords: cosmic reactions in astrophysics, Hawaiian bird extinction myths, weight gain and carbohydrates, ancient mammal reproduction, Colorado River water loss

news:news.news:title: Lebanon engages in peace talks with Israel amid limited influence, while global political tensions rise with Hungary's PM's comments on Russia and Italy's PM condemning Trump.
news:news.news:keywords: Lebanon-Israel peace talks, Hungary Russia relations, Italy Trump criticism, child HIV outbreak in hospital, Harry and Meghan Australia visit

news:news.news:title: Oil prices fell below $100 a barrel amid mixed signals from US-Iran negotiations and concerns over energy market stability.
news:news.news:keywords: oil price fluctuations, US-Iran negotiations impact, Goldman Sachs AI risk awareness, Texas investment strategies, small business success stories

news:news.news:title: Daniel Moreno-Gama faces federal charges for attacking OpenAI CEO Sam Altman, while Microsoft raises Surface device prices amid RAM shortages.
news:news.news:keywords: federal charges against tech CEO, electric vehicle market updates, Microsoft Surface price increase, NZXT class-action lawsuit settlement, Apple Watch Series 11 sales

news:news.news:title: The 2026 WNBA draft saw Azzi Fudd selected first overall, while UCLA set a record with five first-round picks.
news:news.news:keywords: WNBA draft highlights, UCLA basketball achievements, Dick Vitale health announcement, MLB player performances, NHL retirements

news:news.news:title: Recent scientific discoveries highlight advancements in health, environmental challenges, and new insights into human history and genetics.
news:news.news:keywords: health innovations, environmental science, human history discoveries, genetic research, wildlife conservation

news:news.news:title: Hamas Rejects Disarmament, IMF Warns Iran Conflict Could Trigger Global Recession
Lebanon Launches Peace Talks with Israel as Oil Prices Dip Below $100 Amid Market Turbulence
